criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user activity and interaction within the app, including metrics like daily active users (DAU), monthly active users (MAU), and session duration.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store analytics, in-app analytics tools, and third-party market research reports.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI features such as chatbots, recommendation systems, and content moderation tools.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, and technical analyses from app review websites and tech blogs.

criteria.name: User Reviews and Ratings
criteria.description: The average rating and the number of reviews on app stores, reflecting user satisfaction and feedback.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store reviews and ratings.

criteria.name: Downloads and Installations
criteria.description: The total number of app downloads and installations, indicating the app's popularity and reach.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store download statistics, and third-party app market intelligence platforms.

criteria.name: Innovation and Uniqueness
criteria.description: The originality and uniqueness of the app's features and user experience, setting it apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: Expert reviews, tech blogs, and industry reports highlighting innovative features and technologies.
